untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires identifying two distinct peaks with specific morphological characteristics (narrow/pointed vs wide/rounded) and measuring time separation and price proximity. These geometric/shape-based pattern features cannot be expressed using only the allowed price and technical indicators (RSI, MACD, moving averages, etc.). Peak detection, peak classification by shape, and multi-peak relationship validation require custom pattern recognition logic not available in the standard indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal describes a complex candlestick pattern (Double Tops, Adam & Eve) that requires visual/morphological analysis. Provided minimal proxy: entry on close breaking below pivot (pattern support level), exit on reversal above pivot. Author is silent on stop-loss placement; used conservative 3% default. Success rate of 72% in bear markets suggests reliability when pattern is correctly identified, but the core pattern recognition itself is untranslatable to this rule engine.
